case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 240-360s productcatalogservice metrics. Latency.p50 dev=+1.7 (240-270, 330-360) and p90 dev=+1.2 (240-270) persist. Traces show frontend calls with latency.p99 dev=+1.0 to +2.5. Productcatalogservice latency is strongest signal. Ranking confirms productcatalogservice_latency first.
Productcatalogservice latency spikes (p50/p90) and checkoutservice memory anomalies are strongest signals. Traces validate frontend propagation. Final ranking reflects metrics-led hypothesis.
